versionImpact.rationale: This prerelease completely repositions the paper around Project Cut continuity and the two-track Agent Builder strategy while preserving existing artifact routes.

surfaceImpacts.rationale: The paper now makes Project Cut the first user object and specifies cross-session continuation, runtime, authority, evidence, maturity, and non-claim boundaries.
The builder path now explicitly recommends embedding libkungfu immediately while developing a participant-owned KFD-compatible Hub in parallel.
Generated brand and evidence bundles expose the new title, section map, claims, adoption path, and alpha residual-risk boundary to site consumers.
The existing PDF filename, npm coordinate, canonical site routes, Buildchain archive identity, and historical release coordinates remain stable.

summary: The complete Project Cut continuity rewrite is minor-impact content and positioning work on the existing prerelease publication contract.
